author: Priya Iyer
text: Test of Time D2 sentiment looking strong on r/civ — top thread says 'finally the Civ VII I wanted at launch'. Steam reviews trending 87% over last 48h. @comms can we pull a sentiment slide for tomorrow's exec roll-up?

author: Maya Reyes
text: Heads up team, PotatoMcWhiskey's schedule shifted — we can lock the 4-player Time-Tested Civs multiplayer premiere (Potato + ursagaming + Boesthius + Quill18, Fractal Continent showcase) for May 28 instead of May 30. Need confirmation on whether we move the Triumphs system deep-dive solo VoDs with them or split into two days. @alex

author: Tomás Vega
text: Mad Ellie SP1 D30 cohort coming in at 9.8% — under our 14% gate. Recommend we hold the Phase 2 paid surge until we see the next patch land and re-measure. Drafting brief for Davide.

author: Sarah Wu
text: Crash repro on the encounter transition into the second arena. Reliable, can't ship June 5. Realistic new date is July 10. Looping in @marcus and @alex on comms framing.

author: Daniel Okafor
text: Three refresh creative concepts in QA. Brand review Thursday. Realistically GO/NO-GO June 1 — three days QA, two days traffic split. Sharing the concept boards in this thread shortly.

author: Alex Akiyama
text: Daily standup landed. Two things flagged up to Davide this week: (1) Mad Ellie Phase 2 surge — recommending hold pending Patch 1.2, Heaven pre-warned, awaiting Davide call; (2) Wonderlands DLC re-announce — Marcus drafting for Davide sign-off EOD Friday. Everything else operational.

author: Daniel Okafor
text: Heaven Mad Ellie weekly: Phase 1 paid landed clean on TikTok, Spark Ads boost on top 5 hooks at 22% above benchmark CTR. CPMStar in-game pacing fine. Phase 2 we are paused on per Tomás's note re D30. Will refresh the brief once the gate clears.

author: Marcus Lee
text: Lurkit Test of Time quest update: 8,200 hours watched D1–D3, 142 streamers participated across Steam + Epic. Cost-per-hour-watched landing at $0.18, well under our $0.25 ceiling. Extending the quest through the weekend to ride the Time-Tested Civs multiplayer premiere halo (Thu May 28) and the Triumphs deep-dive premieres (Sat May 30).

author: Marcus Lee
text: Free Weekend prep: CreatorIQ shortlist of 40 micro/nano FPS-co-op-adjacent creators landing Friday. Lurkit brief drafted, sending Wednesday. Looking at CPI on the awareness layer — CPMStar quote came back at $4.20 estimated.

author: Priya Iyer
text: Brand creative final hero cut for Test of Time NA paid social is in QA now — I have it. Tracking to land in Open World's hands by 4pm today. Sorry for the slip. Audit on the workflow is owed.
